name: Expressions
description: The most powerful and intuitive column calculator - add unlimited new columns using full Spark SQL expressions. Perfect for feature engineering, business logic, cleaning, formatting, date manipulation, and creating report-ready fields without writing code.

fields.name: outputCols
fields.title: Column Name
fields.description: Name of the new column you want to create (e.g., Revenue_Net, FullName, IsHighValue, OrderMonth).

fields.name: expressions
fields.title: Expression
fields.description:
Full Spark SQL expression to compute the column value. Supports 400+ functions: math, string, date, conditional, regex, JSON, arrays, etc.

Quick Examples:
• amount * quantity
• concat(first_name, ' ', last_name)
• date_format(order_date, 'yyyy-MM')
• when(amount > 10000, 'VIP').otherwise('Regular')
• coalesce(email, phone, 'unknown')

fields.name: inputColumnPropagation
fields.title: Input Column Propagation
fields.description: When true (default) To all original columns are automatically kept + your new ones. Set to false if you want only the newly created columns.

fields.name: outputColNames
fields.title: Output Column Name
fields.description: Force exact output column names (useful with propagation = false)

fields.name: outputColTypes
fields.title: Output Column Type
fields.description: Force data types for new columns
